name: D-H-multi-group-production
description: Production-shaped scenario: three 90-foot pines, one 70-foot oak with stump grinding

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: Thanks for calling NorthStar Tree Service. How can I help?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: I need three 90-foot pines removed and one 70-foot oak taken down with stump grinding.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: Three pines and an oak with stump grinding. Is this an emergency?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: No, not an emergency. The oak is near the driveway though.
